<Feature id="login" name="User Login">
  Authentication experience for sign-in and account access.
  <Definition id="user-credentials" name="User Credentials" version="1.0.0"
    fields='[{"name":"email","type":"string","required":true},{"name":"password","type":"string","required":true}]'
  >
    Credential structure used by login forms and APIs.
  </Definition>
</Feature>
